title: Mochi Symphony(沫琪交响曲)
description:
从高中开始，自学做的第一个模组~
A Minecraft Mod developed from scratch since high school by a self-taught beginner.
body:
> A Fabric mod developed for Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.1 — and a true reflection of my ultra-chuunibyou worldview~ (●'◡'●)

## 📖 Project Overview

**MochiSymphony** is the very first Minecraft mod developed by the **great MochiFrisk**, who self-learned Java like a total pro during high school! This mod is closely connected to my personal fantasy world~

## 🚀 Installation Guide

1. Make sure your Minecraft version is **1.21.1**.  
2. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/) and [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api) version 0.16.9!  
3. Download the latest `MochiSymphony.jar` file.  
4. Put the `.jar` file into your `mods` folder.  
5. Launch Minecraft and enjoy a brand new experience!

## 🎮 How to Use

Once installed, you'll discover tons of new items and fun stuff in the game!

- **Mochi**: A new edible food item. (Yes, it sounds like the Japanese “餅” mochi~) (~~But Moqi is not for eating!~~)  
- **Flame Wand**: A special tool that shoots fireballs. Still in development (maybe?)  
- **New Crafting Recipes**: Many new items can be crafted at the workbench. This one's for real (lol)  
- **Ore Tome**: Having trouble finding ores? Fear not! Just a simple recipe grants you a tome with a whopping **7777** uses to help you locate them!  
- **Lucky Glow**: When you have this effect, a random lucky event will trigger every 10 seconds!

## 🛠️ Developer Info

- **Author**: FanqieFrisk (Yes, the great me, yours truly!)  
- **Project Page**: [GitHub - MochiSymphony](https://github.com/FanqieFrisk/MochiSymphony/)  
- **Contact**: Email - FanqieFrisk@163.com

## 📌 Future Plans

In future updates, I plan to add:

- More magical tools and effects  
- New creatures and hostile mobs  
- Expanded storylines and quest systems

If you have any suggestions or ideas, feel free to reach out via Issues or Pull Requests!

## 📄 License

This project is licensed under the [MIT License](LICENSE).  
You’re free to use, modify, and distribute it, but please keep the original author info intact.

## 💡 Easter Egg

Actually, FanqieFrisk is me, FanqieTomato is also me, and of course, MochiFrisk is me too.  
Don't ask why — my very first Chinese username was literally “Tomato Scrambled Eggs with Shredded Potatoes,” so “Fanqie” (Tomato) kind of stuck around in everything!

> That’s all, folks~ 💕
